name: unidraw
description: Collaborative Canvas Platform - Real-time drawing with 1000+ concurrent users

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w backend && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w shared
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
